metadata.description: Claude Code marketplace for Jonny's local agent skills.

plugins.name: product-management-tools
plugins.description: Product management skills for turning messy inputs into aligned BRDs, PRDs, PBIs, priorities, and roadmaps.

plugins.name: project-management-tools
plugins.description: Project management skills for turning messy inputs into aligned charters, plans, risks, status reports, change decisions, and retrospectives.

plugins.name: folder-monitor-tools
plugins.description: Folder monitoring skills and scripts for detecting new local files, triaging them, and routing them to downstream document or meeting workflows.

plugins.name: document-intake-tools
plugins.description: Document and meeting intake skills for classifying meeting files, gathering local context, and routing outputs to draft, update, or finalize workflows.
